title: Local Dry-Run Readiness Export
objective: Add a local-only JSON export for the PM import-intake dry-run readiness checkpoint without sending a live approval POST, creating an approval row, or mutating project/import state.
scope: Add an Export Readiness Checkpoint action to the existing Local Approval Submission Dry Run panel.
Download the PM Lane 144 readiness checkpoint as JSON with candidate identity, readiness counts, readiness item statuses, approval readback, live-write gate text, and blocked boundaries.
Keep the export local-only and informational.
Extend the focused Playwright smoke to prove the downloaded readiness JSON and zero mutation requests.
not_allowed: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares action.
No secret access or secret rotation.
No backend route or mutation route change.
No project import, workpackage rows, task rows, apparatus rows, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking, workbook macro, or workbook writeback.
No service, auth, DNS, ingress, or control-plane widening.

live_write_gate.required_phrase: I explicitly admit PM Lane 142 live approval POST and first approval-row creation for the current Project Miner Temp Power import candidate.
live_write_gate.note: This phrase was not present for PM Lane 145, so the lane remains local readiness export only.

validation_steps: rg -n "PM Lane 145|Export Readiness Checkpoint|approval-dry-run-readiness|pm_lane_145_local_readiness_v1|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS: operations-web typecheck passed, operations-web production build passed, focused PM import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after correcting the expected candidate_version to pm_import_candidate_read_only_v1, packet JSON parsed, guardrail search confirmed PM Lane 145/readiness-export/zero-mutation evidence plus NETA Topic Spine/TCC parked language, and git diff --check passed.
sidecar_result: No new Desktop Codex execution was needed. Existing NETA Topic Spine Comparative Audit prompt remains the next optional non-PM side-lane handoff if Jason admits it.
next_recommended_lane: PM lane may continue local operator-review ergonomics or await explicit PM Lane 142 live-write admission; Desktop Codex may receive the NETA Topic Spine Comparative Audit prompt if Jason admits that side lane.
